proven.claim: Proven: "report" appears in help (line 546) AND is implemented as
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 546
; Proven: "report" appears in help (line 546) AND is implemented as
; case "report": runReport(rest) in the switch.
(declare-const report_documented Int)
(declare-const report_implemented Int)
(assert (= report_documented 1))
(assert (= report_implemented 1))
(assert (not (= report_documented report_implemented)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — report is both documented and implemented
